values.fieldLabel: Would you like to approve this request?

conditions.leftValue: ={{ $('On form submission').item.json['Would you like to approve this request?'].toJsonString().toLowerCase() }}

parameters.message:
=Hello {{ $('Search records5').item.json['Full Name'] }}, 
Thank you for your willingness to cover the shift for {{ $('Search records5').item.json['Worker Replaced'] }}.
Unfortunately, the shift supervisor was not able to select you for this particular coverage.
We truly value your availability and will keep you in mind for future shift opportunities.
If you have any questions, please reach out to {{ $('Search records4').item.json['Manager Name'] }}.

The request for shift coverage has been cancelled.
The shift has been filled.  
Thank you.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ "message": { "subject": "Replacement Worker Update", "body": { "contentType": "HTML", "content": "Replacement Worker Update

Replacement Worker Update

We appreciate your willingness to cover this shift. Unfortunately, the shift supervisor was not able to select you this time. We will keep you updated on any future shift opportunities.

" + ($('Search records4').item.json['Manager Name'] || '') + " has declined " + ($('Get a record').item.json['Full Name'] || '') + "'s request to cover the below shift.

Shift Details

Call-Off Worker: " + ($('Get a record1').item.json['Full Name'] || '') + "

Shift Date: " + $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.Start.toDateTime().toFormat('MM/dd/yyyy') + "

Shift Time: " + $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.Start.toDateTime().toFormat('hh:mm a') + "

Location: " + ($('Get a record4').item.json['Location Name/Code'] || '') + "

Please contact " + ($('Search records4').item.json['Manager Name'] || '') + " if you have any questions.

© 2025 ESS Workforce Management
" }, "toRecipients": $('Search records1').all().map(item => ({ emailAddress: { address: item.json.Email } })) }, "saveToSentItems": true }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ "message": { "subject": "Replacement Worker Update", "body": { "contentType": "HTML", "content": "Replacement Worker Update

Replacement Worker Update

" + ($('Get a record').item.json['Full Name'] || '') + " has been approved to cover the below shift.

Shift Details

Call-Off Worker: " + ($('Search records').item.json['Full Name'] || '') + "

Shift Date: " + $today.format('MM/dd/yyyy') + "

Shift Time: " + $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.Start.toDateTime().toFormat('hh:mm a') + "

Location: " + ($('Get a record4').item.json['Location Name/Code'] || '') + "

No further action is required for this shift.

© 2025 ESS Workforce Management
" }, "toRecipients": $('Search records1').all().map(item => ({ emailAddress: { address: item.json.Email } })) }, "saveToSentItems": true }) }}
